action_set_definitions.name: list_directory
action_set_definitions.description: Lists files and subdirectories within a specified path to discover configuration files or profile scripts.

path.description: The absolute path to the directory.

action_set_definitions.name: read_file
action_set_definitions.description: Reads the text content of a specified file.

path.description: The absolute path to the file.

action_set_definitions.name: write_file
action_set_definitions.description: Writes or overwrites content to a file at a specific path.

path.description: The absolute path to the file.

content.description: The full string content to write to the file.

action_set_definitions.name: test_connectivity
action_set_definitions.description: Attempts a network connection to a host and port to verify reachability.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_nftables
action_set_definitions.description: Commands to interact with the nftables firewall ruleset.

action.description: The action to perform: 'list_ruleset' to view rules, 'add_rule' to insert a new rule, 'save_to_config' to make current rules persistent.

rule_string.description: The specific rule definition (required for 'add_rule'). Example: 'add rule inet filter output tcp dport 443 accept'

action_set_definitions.name: manage_service
action_set_definitions.description: Manages systemd services (check status, reload, or restart).

state_description.hostname: The network name of the server.
state_description.os_info: Operating system distribution and kernel version.
state_description.cpu_load_avg: System load averages for the past 1, 5, and 15 minutes.
state_description.memory_usage: Total, used, and free memory in MB.
state_description.disk_partitions: List of disk partitions and their current usage percentages.
state_description.active_services: A map of service names to their current systemd status (e.g., active, inactive, failed).
state_description.process_list: A list of currently running processes with PID, user, and resource consumption.
state_description.file_system_contents: A simplified key-value mapping of file paths to their string content for critical config/log files.
state_description.open_ports: List of TCP/UDP ports currently in a LISTEN state.
